originalTitle: Broadcom’s stock falls despite accelerating AI-chip growth
summary: Latest revenue figures lack meaningful upside after the stock’s sharp recent rally.

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
